sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72129" key="o)eidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, late spelling of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾠειδής,</foreign> <sense id="n72129.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">egg-shaped,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1358.tlg003:19:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eudox.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ars</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
